transactions.description: New York Yankees placed SS José Caballero on the 10-day injured list. Right middle finger fracture.
New York Yankees recalled SS Anthony Volpe from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees placed LHP Max Fried on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 14, 2026. Left elbow bone bruise.
New York Yankees recalled RHP Elmer Rodríguez from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
